module.name: client
module.purpose: Client-facing draft split into CLI and a remoc-backed core client session/task endpoint that sends the initial task request, receives streamed response message segments, and separates public client interfaces from private transport helpers with explicit Rust section markers where needed.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core client session endpoint backed by remoc/TCP with task creation, initial request submission, and streamed response segment receives.
